case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. VS. ROLLEN PERRY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, ROLLEN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, ROLLEN $2,259.79 PRINCIPAL, $1,154.40 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,639.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. SERVED APR-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, ROLLEN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $370.26 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, ROLLEN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,632.24 AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, ROLLEN

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,632.24 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,624.20 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
